name: Gel Electrophoresis Band Quantification
description: You are a biochemist quantifying protein expression levels from a gel electrophoresis experiment. Using the 'Gel' sample image in Fiji, perform a gel analysis to quantify all visible lanes and bands. For each detectable band, calculate the background-corrected integrated optical density and express it as a percentage of the strongest band in its lane. Save a results table containing lane number, band position (pixels from top), background-corrected integrated intensity, and relative intensity percentage to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/gel_quantification.csv. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.

metadata.image_source: Fiji built-in sample (File > Open Samples > Gel)
